title: CHRISTMAS IN JULY - 211info
text: REEDSPORT CHURCH OF GOD CHRISTMAS IN JULY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A volunteer program providing yard work, minor construction, and home repair for low-income residents. An example of minor construction would be a ramp for wheelchair-bound people. Volunteers will not do extensive roof work. 2191 Birch Avenue Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Low-income and older adult homeowners. Each home can use this program no more than two times. Hours: 2nd Saturday of July Email (541) 271-3928 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 271-3928 Main phone Main phone (541) 271-3928 Call for information Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Homeowners seeking assistance must fill out an application. Applications are available at the Reedsport Family Resource Center, Ace Hardware, Umpqua Building and Hardware, or churches that participate in the Lower Umpqua Ministerial Association, including the Reedsport Church of God. Volunteer applications are available at the same locations. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Gardiner, Reedsport, Scottsburg, and Winchester Bay TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of S 22nd Street and Birch Avenue Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services Weatherization Programs Yard Maintenance Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - PASTORAL COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REEDSPORT CHURCH OF GOD
